sendAgain: The activation email is being sent again
sendActivateOnSigninAttempt: Your account is not activated. Click on the link contained in the activation email that was just sent to you.
checkEmail: Check your mail for a validation link
checkEmailInstruction: An email is being set containing the activation link for your account to the email address indicated here below. Check your inbox to complete your account creation process.
didNotReceive:
Didn't receive any mail?
1. Double-check the spelling of your email.
2. Check your spam folder
3. %resend%
4. write us at %support%
stayUpToDate: Stay up to date with what is going on with OpenAgenda!
